subcodes.first_line: O My Name, the Most Truthful! Render thanks for that We have caused thee to be present before the Throne, and made thee to hear and to behold the effulgent lights of the Face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمی الاصدق ان اشکر بما احضرناک لدی العرش و اسمعناک و اریناک انوار وجه
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @exhortations and counsels
